design: single prompt x 5 deictic conditions (A=this, B=a, C=your, D=the, E=their)

pairs.A: Why did this large language model cross the road? To get to the next token!
pairs.B: Why did a large language model cross the road? To get to the next token!
pairs.C: Why did your large language model cross the road? To get to the next token!
pairs.D: Why did the large language model cross the road? To get to the next token!
pairs.E: Why did their large language model cross the road? To get to the next token!
